decisions.decision: Fernet encryption for API token at rest

decisions.rationale: Simpler UAT setup — no DB server needed

decisions.decision: Removed 3-field credential form — single 'Continue with Atlassian' button
Button navigates directly to /dashboard (no real OAuth)
decisions.rationale: User did not request real Atlassian OAuth flow — UI-only change
Credential storage flow removed; startup verify became dead code
inotify doesn't work on /mnt/c Windows filesystem — polling required for HMR

decisions.decision: CSS Modules, no shadcn, no Tailwind

next_action: Check Docker build status. If 'VITE ready' seen: open http://localhost:3000, verify Figma design renders, then re-scope UAT and mark phase approved. If not: wait for build then verify.
context_notes: Major UI scope change this session: ConnectionPage redesigned to match UI/html/login.html (Figma reference). 3-field form removed entirely. Backend auth endpoints (POST /api/jira/connect, GET /api/jira/status) still exist but unused by frontend now. Vite polling added for WSL2 Docker compatibility. All CR issues from previous session were committed as 2da6ea0 before this UI change.
